objective: Assessment plumbing: internal assess module + pack CLI + assessment event whitelist; minimal single-topic 1-question loop runnable from /learn:profile.

tasks.description: Add Read(*) to /learn:profile allowed-tools; remove --no-assessment from argument-hint/flags; wire minimal call into internal assess module.
Implement internal assessment module .claude/commands/learn/_internal/assess.js (factory injection) that can run 1-question topic assessment and write pack+events via ccw CLI.
Add ccw pack CLI commands: learn:resolve-pack-key, learn:read-pack, learn:write-pack (overwrite) with storage under .workflow/learn/packs/.
Enforce explicit whitelist in ccw learn:append-profile-event (include ASSESSMENT_* + existing profile events) and add tests.
Add tests for pack read/write/resolve-pack-key and whitelist (ASSESSMENT_* allowed, unknown rejected).

notes: Keep Cycle-1 minimal: do not implement full algorithm/taxonomy governance here.
Do not add Write(*) to /learn:profile; all persistence via ccw CLI.
